Consultancy-Led Branding & Digital Marketing Agency


Eviation Marketing builds distinctive globally minded brands through strategy, creativity, and intentional execution. Born in 2024 and refined through real client work, we shape brand identities, digital presence, and content ecosystems designed to last with clarity and craft, making your brand feel like you.

PRESENCE

.

FOCUSED CRAFT
.
GLOBAL FOOTPRINT
.
GOA

[01]

We led social media marketing for Hotel Navil Exotica, building a credible, locally trusted hotel presence around Vasco da Gama through consistent positioning, content systems, and visibility-driven digital storytelling.

KARNATAKA

[02]

Delivered rebranding and full-funnel digital marketing for Hotel Éden and Hotel Éden Ember Castle — spanning identity, social media, performance campaigns, creatives, and influencer collaborations for stronger market recall.

DUBAI

[03]

Built a compact, premium-first brand identity for SBS Candles, crafting a cohesive visual system that elevated perceived value and created immediate shelf and social recall.

AHMEDABAD

[05]

Partnered with Wearnou on visual production and campaign planning for an upcoming luxury footwear collection, aligning brand storytelling with launch-ready creative direction and asset planning.

HARYANA

[04]

Serve as end-to-end digital growth partners for Gurvaani — driving SMM, performance marketing, influencer strategy, and structured digital scale for a chemical-free jaggery startup brand.

QATAR

[06]

Designed a targeted SEO growth strategy for Aptech Qatar, significantly improving search rankings, discoverability, and qualified visibility across key computer education search categories.

Chandibi Sayyed

Founder

Allures Studio

"I highly recommend Eviation Marketing for their incredible support in helping me build and promote my salon's brand. They not only enhanced my branding but also helped me effectively reach out to new clients. Thanks to their strategic approach, my salon's services are now more visible, and we've seen an increase in client engagement. Their team is professional, creative, and genuinely invested in my business's success!"

Dr. Albino Thomson

Assistant Prof. & PD


Goa University


"We highly recommend Eviation Marketing for their professional and creative digital marketing services. They recently designed a brochure and promotional poster for our IMBA program and delivered exceptional results. Their ability to incorporate feedback swiftly and accommodate last-minute changes with professionalism and efficiency made the entire process smooth and impressive. Eviation Marketing is a reliable and quality-driven partner for any organization seeking impactful digital communication solutions."

Murrel Fernandes

Co-Partner

Milan Group

"I wanted to let you know that you're doing a great job! We're seeing strong reach and engagement, which is fantastic. What I especially appreciate is the open communication we have, it makes a real difference. Please continue this high level of service."

Vaibhav Khavnekar

Founder & COO

Criuzen

"I highly recommend Eviation Marketing for their excellent support in building and promoting my brand, Criuzen. They helped improve our brand presence and reach the right audience in the car enthusiast space. Their strategic approach increased visibility and engagement, and the team was professional, creative, and genuinely invested in our growth."

Pallavi

Co-Founder

Kavi Events

"Eviation delivered exactly what was promised with professionalism and attention to detail. The team was responsive, reliable, and a pleasure to work with. Highly recommended."

Rinita Nagvenkar

Founder

Silverline Creation

"We highly recommend Eviation Marketing, they are a great team to work with. If you really want to upgrade your brand on social media & create online presence, Eviation is the right agency to get it done. They have recently designed our brand identity, brochure, and website for Silverline Creation. Their ability to incorporate feedback swiftly and accommodate last minute changes with professionalism and efficiency made the entire process smooth and impressive. Eviation Marketing is a reliable digital communications solution provider"

Aryan Mashelkar

Founder

Velocity Cricket

"Eviation has been with me since day one of starting my business, and that itself speaks volumes. They didn’t just provide services, they believed in the vision and helped shape it. Their creativity and dedication have played a key role in my business growth. It’s rare to find an agency that treats your business like their own, and I’m grateful to have them as partners."

FAQ

.

WHAT SERVICES DO YOU
OFFER?

We offer branding, social media management, content strategy, performance marketing, visual production, website development, and creative designing.

8945

Z5

21334

HOW DO YOUR PACKAGES WORK?

We start with a brand discovery conversation. From there, we build a customized engagement based on your needs, timelines, growth ambitions, and investment range — rather than offering rigid, pre-set packages.


89456

645

21334

TYPICAL PROJECT TIMELINE?

Timelines vary by scope. Branding projects usually take 3–5 weeks, social media setup 7–10 days, and websites 4–7 weeks from approved brief.


WHY DO YOU NEED BRANDING?

Branding is the difference between being seen and being remembered. It shapes perception, builds trust, and influences choice. Strong branding creates credibility, emotional connection, and ensures your business looks consistent, professional, and distinctive. Without it, even great products/ services struggle to stand out.

89456

6452

ARE YOUR SERVICES GLOBAL?

Yes. We collaborate with clients worldwide using structured processes, async workflows, and clear communication systems. We help founders and growing brands with everything from brand building to social media, content, and digital growth.

89456

6452
